item.title: ✨ Experience Spotlight: Goðafoss Waterfall and Whale Watching Tour, Akureyri 🐋
item.description:
✨ Experience Spotlight: Goðafoss Waterfall and Whale Watching Tour, Akureyri 🐋
Seven hours covering two of North Iceland's most iconic natural sights in a single shore day. Goðafoss thundering at 12 metres high and 30 metres wide, then out onto Eyjafjörður to look for humpbacks and minke whales.
Perfect if your ship calls at Akureyri and you want one excursion that captures the real North Iceland. 🌊
✨ What makes this special: → Goðafoss Waterfall, 12 metres high and 30 metres wide, one of Iceland's most spectacular landmarks 💧 → Whale watching on Eyjafjörður, one of the longest fjords in Iceland 🐋 → Humpback whales, minke whales, harbour porpoises and white-beaked dolphins regularly sighted 🐬 → Rarer chances of killer whales and blue whales in season 🌊 → Comfortable coach transfer from Akureyri Port with flexible drop-off at Botanical Garden, City Centre or Cruise Port 🚌 → Multilingual reading material provided throughout the day 📖
Built around the cruise day, with timings designed so you return to port well before sailing. Full refund applies if your ship is unable to call at Akureyri.
*Seven hours, two iconic North Iceland sights, one shore day* 🗓️
Ready to make the most of your day in Akureyri? 🐋 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Iceland #Akureyri #ShoreExcursions #CruiseTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Barbati Beachfront, Corfu 🌊
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Barbati Beachfront, Corfu 🌊
Four bedrooms, a private pool, and a Blue Flag beach you can walk to in minutes. Villa Barbati Beachfront sits on Corfu's northeast coast, where you can leave the car behind and step straight from the garden into village life.
Perfect if you want the rhythm of a Greek beach village without giving up real space or privacy. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Beachfront position on Corfu's northeast coast, steps from a Blue Flag beach 🏖️ → Sleeps eight across four bedrooms with two ensuite doubles and two twin rooms 🛏️ → Private 10m x 5m pool with Roman steps, sun loungers and shaded terrace 🏊‍♀️ → Landscaped gardens with alfresco dining area and stone barbecue 🌿 → Bright ground-floor living with fully equipped kitchen, dining area and conservatory 🍽️ → Walking distance to local tavernas, shops and the beach, car optional 🚶
Sleeps eight across four bedrooms and four bathrooms, with Wi-Fi, air conditioning and all the essentials handled. Ideal for families or two couples travelling together who want beachfront ease without resort crowds.
Eight guests, four bathrooms, and a private pool steps from a Blue Flag beach 🌊
Ready to swap the car keys for sandy feet? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Corfu #GreekIslands #VillaRental #BeachfrontVilla #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: A Grand Journey from Tropical Delights to Storied Coastlines & Artistic Allure, Miami to Barcelona 🌊
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: A Grand Journey from Tropical Delights to Storied Coastlines & Artistic Allure, Miami to Barcelona 🌊
Twenty-four nights aboard EXPLORA I, sailing from Miami to Barcelona with thirteen ports threading the Caribbean and Mediterranean. Explora Journeys built this route for travellers who want the rhythm of a true transatlantic crossing without losing the warmth and variety of a destination cruise.
Perfect if you've been waiting for a cruise that feels like a journey, not a circuit. 🧭
✨ What makes this special: → 24-night transatlantic voyage calling at 13 ports across the Caribbean and Mediterranean ⚓ → All-inclusive: unlimited beverages including champagne, in-suite dining, gratuities and Wi-Fi 🥂 → Eleven culinary venues and twelve bars and lounges with around-the-clock dining and drinks 🍽️ → Five pools including an infinity pool, plus full-service spa facilities 🏊‍♀️ → Chef's kitchen classes and exclusive culinary experiences on board 👨‍🍳 → Complimentary shore excursion shuttles at every port of call 🚐
Sailing 9 March to 2 April 2026, the route runs Miami, San Juan, St Maarten, Tenerife, Lanzarote, Tangier, Barcelona, Marseille, Ajaccio, Livorno, Civitavecchia, Valencia and Palma. Ideal for couples and seasoned cruisers who want depth, space, and time at sea between the headline ports.
24 nights · 13 ports · two oceans · one ship 🌍
Cross an ocean in proper style. 🌊 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#ExploraJourneys #TransatlanticCruise #LuxuryCruise #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: The Silo Hotel, Cape Town 🏨
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: The Silo Hotel, Cape Town 🏨
A reimagined grain silo on the V&A Waterfront, designed by Thomas Heatherwick of London 2012 Olympic Cauldron fame, with five-metre glass windows framing Table Mountain. The Silo sits directly above the Zeitz MOCAA, Cape Town's landmark modern art gallery, making it the address for design and art lovers in the city.
Perfect if you've been searching for somewhere that pairs architectural pedigree with serious comfort. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Heatherwick-designed conversion of a historic V&A Waterfront grain silo 🏨 → Sits directly above the Zeitz MOCAA modern art gallery 🎟️ → Rooms individually styled by Liz Biden of Royal Malewane and La Residence 🛏️ → Five-metre glass windows framing Cape Town and Table Mountain 🌅 → Rooftop pool with views across the Waterfront and the mountain 🏊‍♀️ → Rooftop dining with panoramic city and mountain views 🍽️
Seven distinct room categories culminate in a penthouse suite that takes the views to their full extent. Ideal for couples, design enthusiasts and discerning luxury travellers, with peak season running November to March.
*Five-metre windows across seven room categories, perched above the V&A Waterfront* 🌅
Ready to escape to your own private sanctuary? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#CapeTown #SouthAfrica #LuxuryTravel #DesignHotel #TheJLTCollection**
---

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Disney Hotel New York - The Art of Marvel, Disneyland Paris 🏨
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Disney Hotel New York - The Art of Marvel, Disneyland Paris 🏨
A Disney resort hotel where over 350 original Marvel artworks line the walls and 561 Manhattan-style rooms sit steps from the Disney Parks. The Art of Marvel is the world's largest collection of Marvel artwork displayed in a hotel, and it's built for families who want comic-book energy with proper Disney comfort.
Perfect if you've been waiting for the right reason to plan a Disneyland Paris trip with serious wow factor. 🌟
✨ What makes this special: → Over 350 original Marvel pieces by 110 international artists throughout the hotel 🎨 → 561 contemporary Manhattan-style rooms, each with vibrant Marvel prints 🛏️ → Metro Pool complex with heated indoor and outdoor pools, kids' pool and hot tub 🏊‍♀️ → Marvel Hero Photo Stations and Disney PhotoPass for immersive superhero shots 📸 → Marvel Design Studio where young guests create their very own Marvel masterpiece 🎨 → Free shuttle to the Parks plus Extra Magic Time access, free parking and Wi-Fi 🚌
A hotel with 561 rooms spanning Superior, Empire State Club and three Marvel-themed Suite categories. Ideal for families, Marvel fans, couples, and multi-generational groups who want to stay on resort and walk to the Parks.
Over 350 original Marvel artworks by 110 international artists, all under one roof 🎨
Ready to step inside the world's biggest Marvel hotel? 🌟 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#DisneylandParis #ArtOfMarvel #FamilyTravel #DisneyHotels #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Heavenly Greece, Italy & Croatia, Athens (round trip) 🚢
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Heavenly Greece, Italy & Croatia, Athens (round trip) 🚢
Seven nights, seven ports, four countries, all from a round-trip start in Athens aboard Celestyal Journey. This is the Adriatic and Ionian done properly... real time ashore in Dubrovnik and Kotor, not just a passing wave.
A genuinely inclusive cruise where the price you book is close to the price you pay. 🌊
✨ What makes this special: → Seven-night round trip from Athens visiting seven ports across Greece, Croatia, Montenegro and Italy 🗺️ → All meals included plus unlimited coffee, tea, water and juice from the moment you board 🍽️ → Complimentary Wi-Fi, all port fees and gratuities built into your fare ✨ → Full day PLUS late-night stay in Dubrovnik to walk the city walls after the day-trippers leave 🏰 → Kotor's medieval maze of Venetian palaces and churches set in a dramatic mountain bay ⛰️ → Kefalonia's Melissani Cave with its mystical underground lake and Ionian sunsets 🌅
Celestyal Journey carries 1,260 guests across 630 cabins, including 150 suites and 149 balcony cabins, with two pools, Sozo Spa, seven restaurants and eight bars on board. 2026 sailings run March through October, ideal for couples, friend groups and multi-generational families who want depth of itinerary without the mega-ship crowds.
Seven ports, four countries, one round trip from Athens... no airport hops, no domestic flights 🧭
Ready to sail Greece, Croatia, Montenegro and Italy in a single week? 🚢 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#CelestyalCruises #MediterraneanCruise #Dubrovnik #GreekIslands #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: 9-Day Baltic on Norwegian Jewel, France, Germany & Belgium 🚢
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: 9-Day Baltic on Norwegian Jewel, France, Germany & Belgium 🚢
Nine days, eight ports and six countries aboard Norwegian Jewel, sailing from Southampton to Copenhagen via Paris, Bruges, Amsterdam, Oslo and Berlin. One ship, one unpacking, and a different European capital almost every morning.
Perfect if you've been searching for a multi-destination holiday without the airport hops between cities. ⚓
✨ What makes this special: → Paris day trip from Le Havre taking in the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre and Montmartre 🗼 → Brussels and Bruges via Zeebrugge, with the Grand Place and medieval streets 📍 → Amsterdam's canals, the Van Gogh Museum and the Anne Frank House 🌿 → Oslo's Viking Ship Museum, fjord views and Akershus Castle, built in 1300 🏰 → Berlin day trip from Warnemünde, including the Brandenburg Gate 🌍 → Free at Sea included: premium drinks, speciality dining, excursion discounts and Wi-Fi 🍽️
Embarks Southampton on a Wednesday and disembarks Copenhagen after eight nights on board. Ideal for families, couples and groups of friends who want a proper European adventure in one trip.
*Eight ports across six countries on a single nine-day sailing* 🌍
Ready to set sail? ⚓ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#BalticCruise #NorwegianJewel #LuxuryCruise #EuropeanTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Forte Village Resort, Sardinia 🏖️
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Forte Village Resort, Sardinia 🏖️
One hundred acres of pine forest and tropical gardens running down to a private white sandy beach on Sardinia's southern coast, with 21 restaurants, 10 pools and a thalassotherapy spa built into the grounds. Forte Village has been named World's Leading Resort at the World Travel Awards every year since 1998, and once you arrive you understand why nobody needs to leave the gates.
Perfect if your idea of a holiday is everything in one place, with the kind of range that keeps every generation happy. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Over 100 acres of mature pine and tropical gardens fronting a private white sandy beach 🌊 → 21 restaurants and bars including Gordon Ramsay's Hell's Kitchen and Michelin-starred gourmet dining 🍽️ → Ten swimming pools plus a children's aqua park with water slides 🏊‍♀️ → Acquaforte Thalasso and Spa, one of Europe's leading thalassotherapy centres 💆‍♀️ → Sports academies led by European champions across tennis, football, go-karting and bowling 🎾 → Children's Wonderland with supervised activities for ages 2 to 17, and under-13s stay free in selected periods 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
Eight hotels and 13 villas across the estate mean you can match the accommodation to your group, whether that's a romantic suite or a multi-generational villa. Available summer 2026 with up to 20% off rates outside the 1–16 August window.
*World's Leading Resort at the World Travel Awards every year since 1998* 👑
Ready to escape to a resort that genuinely has it all? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Sardinia #ForteVillage #LuxuryFamilyTravel #ItalyHolidays #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Adventures in Patagonia, Argentina & Chile 🏔️
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Adventures in Patagonia, Argentina & Chile 🏔️
Fourteen days walking the wild edge of South America, from the tango streets of Buenos Aires to the granite towers of Torres del Paine and the blue ice of Perito Moreno. This is Patagonia at full pace, with the routes, the guides, and the logistics handled so you can focus on the landscape.
Built for travellers who want their adventure earned on foot, not watched through a window. 🥾
✨ What makes this special: → 🏔️ Torres del Paine National Park immersion with accommodation inside the park → 🧊 Perito Moreno Glacier ice trekking with crampons across the blue ice → 🥾 Mount Fitzroy base hike, a challenging 26km day across nine hours → 🐧 Penguin spotting at Isla Martillo and Beagle Channel wildlife viewing → 💃 Buenos Aires exploration with tango culture and kaleidoscopic neighbourhoods → 🧭 Expert Explore Tour Leader, local guides, and all internal transport included
Thirteen nights of hotel accommodation with thirteen breakfasts and three dinners, plus every bus, ferry, and internal flight handled. Multiple 2026 and 2027 departures available for adventure travellers ready for a full-on pace.
Fourteen days, two countries, one of the wildest landscapes left on the planet 🌍
Ready for the adventure of a lifetime? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Patagonia #AdventureTravel #SouthAmerica #WalkingHolidays #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Mykonos & Santorini Island Hopping Adventure, Greece 🇬🇷
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Mykonos & Santorini Island Hopping Adventure, Greece 🇬🇷
Seven days, six nights, and two of the Aegean's most iconic islands linked by ferry. This is independent travel with the route already mapped, leaving you free to chase windmills, beach clubs, and caldera sunsets on your own clock.
Built for travellers who want the buzz of Mykonos and the drama of Santorini without the planning headache. ✨
✨ What makes this special: → 🛥️ Ferry island hopping between Mykonos and Santorini, two of Greece's most celebrated islands → 🏖️ Free days on Mykonos to explore the famous windmills, whitewashed streets, and beaches → 🎧 Paradise and Super Paradise Beach nightlife with world-famous DJs → 🌋 Santorini caldera views and volcano boat trips → 🌅 Breathtaking Santorini sunsets from Skaros rock above Fira town → 🏨 6 nights accommodation with hostel, 3-star, or 4-star hotel options
Departs Athens (Piraeus Port) and ends in Fira, Santorini, with 6 breakfasts and all inter-island ferry transport included. Ideal for 18-30 somethings, solo travellers, and marine or adventure seekers who want structure without a tour group.
7 days, 6 nights, 2 islands, one Aegean route already mapped 🧭
Ready for the adventure of a lifetime? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Greece #IslandHopping #Mykonos #Santorini #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Jabali Ridge, Ruaha National Park 🌍
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Jabali Ridge, Ruaha National Park 🌍
Eight suites perched on a rocky outcrop above the Mwagusi River, looking out over a wild baobab forest in Tanzania's largest and least-visited national park. Jabali Ridge is built for travellers who want serious wilderness without the Serengeti crowds.
Perfect if you've been searching for proper safari solitude where the wildlife outnumbers the guests. 🦁
✨ What makes this special: → 🛏️ Eight romantic suites perched atop a rocky outcrop above the Mwagusi River → 🏊‍♀️ Private infinity pool overlooking a wild baobab forest → 🚙 Private guide and dedicated vehicle for exclusive game drives → 🌙 Night game drives into one of Tanzania's most wildlife-rich parks → 👣 Walking safaris through Ruaha's vast wilderness from June to February → 💆‍♀️ On-site spa with professional therapists
Ruaha is home to roughly one-tenth of the world's lion population and over 550 bird species across the surrounding habitat. Ideal for couples, photographers, and seasoned safari travellers who want premium wilderness with very few other guests in sight.
Eight suites at the crossroads of southern and east African habitats, in Tanzania's largest national park 🌅
Enquire now to check availability. Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Ruaha #Tanzania #SafariLodge #LuxurySafari #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Japan Hike, Bike & Kayak, Across Japan 🗾
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Japan Hike, Bike & Kayak, Across Japan 🗾
Twelve days of hiking ancient pilgrimage trails, cycling 75km across the Seto Inland Sea, and sea kayaking around Ikuchijima Island. This is Japan on foot, on two wheels, and on the water, with locally-based leaders who know exactly where to take you next.
Perfect if you want Japan's depth without the bullet-train blur. 🥾
✨ What makes this special: → Hike the Nakasendo Trail between the preserved post towns of Magome and Tsumago 🥾 → Cycle 75km across the Shimanami Kaido island-hopping route over the Seto Inland Sea 🚴 → Sea kayak around Ikuchijima Island in the Seto Inland Sea 🛶 → Walk a section of the Kumano Kodo, a UNESCO World Heritage pilgrimage trail ⛩️ → Full Kyoto day taking in Fushimi Inari, Gion, Ginkakuji, the Mt. Daimonji-yama hike, and Kinkakuji 🌸 → Stay in traditional ryokans and guesthouses with onsen hot springs along the way ♨️
Small groups of 1-12 with locally-based trip leaders, departures available year-round including November 2026. Best for active travellers who want a multi-discipline route through Japan rather than a bus tour through it.
*12 days, 11 nights, three disciplines, six regions, one country properly explored* 🗺️
Ready to see Japan the way it's meant to be seen? 🗾 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Japan #AdventureTravel #SmallGroupTours #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Marrakech La Palmeraie, Morocco 🌴
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Marrakech La Palmeraie, Morocco 🌴
An all-inclusive Club Med set within Morocco's oldest palm grove, twenty minutes from Marrakech Airport and the Medina souks. Built for groups who want a single base for everything from kids' clubs to Atlas Mountains excursions, with the city's energy on the doorstep.
Perfect if you want the depth of a Morocco trip without the logistics of moving between hotels. 🐫
✨ What makes this special: → All-inclusive resort set within Morocco's oldest palm grove, minutes from the Medina 🌴 → 32 included activities including flying trapeze, padel, archery, yoga, and a 9-hole pitch and putt 🎾 → Club Med Spa by Cinq Mondes for beauty and wellness treatments 💆‍♀️ → Dedicated kids' clubs for every age from 0 to 17, plus a playful family pool 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 → Gourmet Moroccan and international dining in the resort's palm grove setting, unlimited premium open bar 🍽️ → Excursions to the Atlas Mountains, Agafay Desert, and Essaouira coastline 🏔️
Open year-round with multiple room categories from Superior through to Exclusive Collection riads celebrating Moroccan craftsmanship. Ideal for families, honeymooners, and multi-generational groups who want one base with options for everyone.
*32 included activities, kids' clubs for ages 0–17, and a spa by Cinq Mondes inside Morocco's oldest palm grove* 🌴
Ready to settle into Morocco's oldest palm grove? 🌴 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Marrakech #Morocco #ClubMed #FamilyTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Grand Seine & Rhône, France 🚢
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Grand Seine & Rhône, France 🚢
Fourteen nights sailing France end to end, from Paris through Normandy and Burgundy down to Provence, aboard AmaWaterways' AmaLyra. One unpacking, twelve ports, and the country's three great rivers doing the heavy lifting.
Perfect if you've wanted to see France slowly, without the train stations and hotel changes. 🍷
✨ What makes this special: → Fourteen nights sailing the Seine, Saône and Rhône from Paris to Arles 🚢 → Twelve ports including Rouen, Dijon, Lyon, Avignon and Arles 📍 → Fly-cruise from £6,069pp with return flights from London or Manchester ✈️ → Burgundy vineyards, medieval Normandy and sun-drenched Provence in one sailing 🍇 → Optional 2 nights pre-cruise in Paris or 3 nights post-cruise on the French Riviera 🗼 → "Celebration of Wine" themed sailings on November 2026 and March 2027 departures 🍷
Sailing 2026 from July through November, and from March 2027 onward. Built for couples, solo travellers and anyone who reads a wine list before a menu, with solo specials available on selected departures.
*Three rivers, twelve ports, one unpacking across fourteen nights* 🌅
Ready to see France from the water? 🍷 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#RiverCruise #France #AmaWaterways #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: The Layar Villas, Seminyak 🌴
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: The Layar Villas, Seminyak 🌴
Twenty-three private-pool villas at the heart of Seminyak, each with sail-inspired architecture and your own landscaped garden. The Layar gives you the privacy of a standalone villa with the service depth of a full resort, moments from Petitenget Beach.
A rare find for couples or families who want true privacy without losing walkable access to Seminyak's boutiques and beach bars. 🌊
✨ What makes this special: → Private swimming pool in every villa, from one to four bedrooms 🏊‍♀️ → Sail-inspired architecture with dramatic rooflines and open-plan interiors ✨ → Mezzanine media rooms and outdoor dining terraces in every villa 🎬 → Daily breakfast, welcome massage, and chocolate box on arrival 💆‍♀️ → On-site Settimo Cielo Italian restaurant with room service and buggy shuttle 🍝 → Central Seminyak, minutes from Petitenget Beach and boutique dining 🏖️
Villas sleep two to eight guests across one to four bedrooms, with 150-plus on-site staff and private chef services on request. Ideal for couples wanting a private retreat, or families and friend groups who want space without sacrificing buzz.
*Twenty-three private-pool villas with 150+ staff, moments from Petitenget Beach* 🌅
Ready to escape to your own slice of Seminyak? 🌴 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Bali #Seminyak #VillaRental #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Inca Trail & Machu Picchu, Cusco Region, Peru 🏔️
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Inca Trail & Machu Picchu, Cusco Region, Peru 🏔️
Four days on the legendary Inca Trail from Km 82 to Machu Picchu, arriving through the Sun Gate at sunrise. A guided trek through high Andean passes, cloud-forest ruins, and the kind of mountain views that justify every step.
Built for travellers who want the real route in, not the train shortcut. 🥾
✨ What makes this special: → Four-day guided trek from Km 82 to Machu Picchu, groups of up to 16 maximum 🥾 → Arrive through the Sun Gate at sunrise, then explore Machu Picchu via guided Circuit 3 🌅 → Tackle Dead Woman's Pass at 4,215m with panoramic Andean views 🏔️ → Walk through Phuyupatamarka and the terraces of Wiñay Wayna along the trail 🗿 → Premium camping with tents and sleeping mats provided, porters carry the majority of your gear 🎒 → Return to Cusco on the scenic Vistadome Panoramic train through the Urubamba Valley 🚆
Four days and three nights with English-speaking local expert guides, 4 breakfasts, 3 lunches, and 3 dinners included (vegetarian options available). Departures running October 2026 through December 2027, rated Challenging at 4 out of 5.
*From £628 per person, group size capped at 16, with porters handling the heavy gear so you only carry a daypack* 🏔️
Ready to walk the original route to Machu Picchu? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#IncaTrail #MachuPicchu #Peru #AdventureTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Royal Savoy Hotel, Sharks Bay 🌊
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Royal Savoy Hotel, Sharks Bay 🌊
An adults-only 5-star all-inclusive on a private stretch of the Red Sea, three kilometres from Sharm El Sheikh airport and eight from the buzz of Naama Bay. Royal Savoy sits in its own exclusive corner of the Savoy grounds, with full access to one of the resort coast's biggest entertainment complexes.
Built for grown-ups who want quiet mornings, world-class diving, and dinner options that change every night of the week. ✨
✨ What makes this special: → Adults-only (12+) 5-star hotel in an exclusive area of the Savoy grounds 🏨 → Private beach on Sharks Bay, one of the finest diving spots in the world 🤿 → Multiple swimming pools, including heated outdoor and indoor facilities 🏊‍♀️ → All-inclusive dining and drinks from 10am to midnight, plus access to 15 restaurants across the Savoy complex 🍽️ → SOHO Square entertainment on resort, with ice-skating, bowling, teppanyaki, bars and clubs 🎳 → Exclusive Royal Savoy Morning Room for private breakfast, plus spa, sauna, jacuzzi and fitness centre 💆‍♀️
Three kilometres from the airport and eight from Naama Bay, with water sports, tennis, squash and beach volleyball on tap. Ideal for couples, dive-keen travellers, and friend groups wanting a quieter base with the option to step into the energy of Sharm whenever you feel like it.
*Private Red Sea beach, 15 restaurants across the complex, three kilometres from the airport* 🌅
Ready to swap the everyday for a private Red Sea sanctuary? 🌊 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#SharmElSheikh #RedSea #AdultsOnly #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: London to Copenhagen, British Isles & Norway 🚢
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: London to Copenhagen, British Isles & Norway 🚢
Fourteen nights aboard Oceania Marina, sailing from Southampton through the Hebrides and Shetlands, into Norway's deepest fjords, and finishing in Copenhagen. Eleven ports, no long-haul flights, and the kind of remote coastlines large cruise ships rarely reach.
A voyage built for travellers who care more about where the ship goes than how big the ship is. 🧭
✨ What makes this special: → 14 nights aboard Oceania Marina, an intimate mid-size ship known for destination-focused itineraries and exceptional cuisine 🍽️ → 11 ports across the British Isles, Ireland, Norway and Sweden, from wild Atlantic coast to deep fjord country 🌍 → Skjolden on Sognefjord (Europe's longest fjord), plus Nordfjordeid, Eidfjord and scenic Ålesund 🏔️ → Remote calls at Stornoway in the Hebrides and Lerwick in the Shetlands, rarely visited by large cruise ships ⚓ → Coastal Killybegs in County Donegal, one of Ireland's most authentic fishing villages 🇮🇪 → Round voyage from London (Southampton) to Copenhagen with no need for long-haul flights ✈️
Departing 26 June and returning 10 July 2026, with cabin categories ranging from veranda staterooms to Owner's Suites of over 2,000 square feet. Fares start from £2,886 per guest, with 35% off select Penthouse Suites until 30 June 2026. Suited to fjord-lovers, repeat cruisers chasing genuinely unusual ports, and travellers who want a route built around the places, not the headline destinations.
*Eleven ports across four countries in fourteen nights, from the Shetlands to Sognefjord* 🧭
Ready to sail the fjords without the crowds? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#OceaniaCruises #NorwegianFjords #LuxuryCruise #BritishIsles #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Luxurious Lyngen Lodge, Lyngen Fjord, Norway ❄️
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Luxurious Lyngen Lodge, Lyngen Fjord, Norway ❄️
Six days split between Tromsø and an exclusive lodge deep in the Lyngen Alps, with dog sledding, ice fishing, and Northern Lights viewing built into the rhythm of the trip. Two nights in the city to settle in, then three or four nights at Lyngen Lodge with eight en-suite rooms and first-class hosting waiting at the end of the fjord.
A proper Arctic winter escape for travellers who want adventure during the day and deluxe comfort at night. 🌌
✨ What makes this special: → Two nights in Tromsø to ease into the Arctic before heading deeper north 🏔️ → Three to four nights at the exclusive Lyngen Lodge sleeping up to eighteen guests across eight en-suite rooms 🛏️ → Dog sledding through the Norwegian Arctic wilderness (from approx. £315pp) 🐕 → Frozen lake experience with traditional ice fishing on the ice 🎣 → Winter sea safari on the Lyngen Fjord (from approx. £315pp) 🌊 → Northern Lights viewing opportunities throughout the stay ✨

Sayari Camp sits in prime position in the northern Serengeti, where the plains stretch out and the wildlife calendar runs all year. From July to October, the surrounding rivers become the stage for the Great Migration crossings, one of the most extraordinary sights in nature.
Perfect if you've been searching for a wild, intimate safari with the comforts of a true home in the bush. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Fifteen spacious tented suites with mahogany floors, fine linens and a choice of king or twin beds 🛏️ → En suite bathrooms with freestanding tubs overlooking the savannah and private outdoor showers on every deck 💆‍♀️ → Infinity pool with panoramic views across the Serengeti plains 🏊‍♀️ → Twice-daily game drives with expert guides tracking lion, leopard, cheetah, black rhino and the full Big Five 🌍 → Walking safaris through the wilderness available June to January 👣 → Hot air balloon safaris, spa treatments and campfire sundowners on offer 🌅
Open June through March and welcoming children aged five and over. Ideal for honeymooners, couples and families looking for a year-round wildlife escape, with two private Retreat suites available for those wanting their own chef and guide.
*Fifteen tented suites in one of the Serengeti's most celebrated locations* 🌍
Ready to escape to the wild heart of Tanzania? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩

item.description:

Eight days that pair the Italian Lakes with the snow-capped Engadin, all from a comfortable lakeside hotel in Tremezzo with views across to Bellagio. You travel with a small group and an expert Tour Manager, so the logistics are handled and you can focus on the scenery.

A small group of up to 36 guests, with multiple departures from June to September 2026 (and 2027 dates also available). Ideal for couples, scenery and railway lovers, and anyone who wants the lakes and the Alps in one itinerary.

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Antarctica Aurora Australis - The Southern Lights, Antarctica 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Antarctica Aurora Australis - The Southern Lights, Antarctica 🌍
Fifteen nights aboard an ice-strengthened polar expedition vessel, sailing below the Antarctic Circle during the peak of the sun's 11-year solar cycle. This is the rare voyage where the Southern Lights become the headline act, not a hopeful footnote.
Perfect if you've been searching for genuine wilderness travel with real scientific depth. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → High chances of seeing the Aurora Australis during its peak solar cycle 🌅 → Journey below the Antarctic Circle to rarely explored ice shelves and islands 🌍 → Spot humpback and minke whales, leopard seals, Adélie and gentoo penguins 🐧 → Explore abandoned British research stations and famous explorer huts 📍 → Voyage aboard MV Ortelius, an ice-strengthened polar expedition ship with open-bridge policy 🚢 → All meals, shore excursions, Zodiac activities, and expert naturalist lectures included 🎟️
A 15-night March departure from Ushuaia, the southernmost city in the world, with night-sky sessions led by astronomer and physicist Dr. Tyler Nordgren. Ideal for serious travellers who want the Antarctic and the aurora in one voyage.
*15 nights below the Antarctic Circle during the solar cycle's peak* 🌅
Ready to witness the Southern Lights from the edge of the polar wilderness? Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Antarctica #PolarExpedition #AuroraAustralis #ExpeditionCruise #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Jewels of Japan
item.description:

Picture yourself gliding through Japan's storied landscapes by bullet train, from neon-lit Tokyo to the serene torii gates of Miyajima, soaking in the country's most iconic sights across eleven days of temples, gardens and cultural encounters.
✨ What makes this special: → Explore Tokyo's Imperial Palace, Sensoji Temple and the towering Tokyo Skytree → Ascend Mount Fuji's 5th Station for sweeping panoramic views of Japan's most sacred peak → Ride the legendary Shinkansen bullet train through Japan's iconic landscapes to Kyoto → Wander Kyoto's Golden Pavilion, Kiyomizu Temple and the 10,000 red torii gates of Fushimi Inari → Try your hand at traditional soba noodle-making and a Japanese tea ceremony → Fully inclusive: 9 breakfasts, 8 lunches, 9 dinners, international flights, visa fees, rail passes and all entrance fees
Eleven days of Japan's finest moments, from £5,790 per person with departures running through to December 2027. Discover more and reserve your place.

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Japan by Train, Tokyo to Kyoto 🚄
item.description:

Fourteen days across Japan by bullet train, linking Tokyo's neon energy to Kyoto's geisha quarters, Hiroshima's Peace Park, and a hot spring under Mount Fuji. A tailor-made itinerary that lets you see the country the way the Japanese do… on the Shinkansen.
Perfect if you want depth and pace in equal measure, without the logistics. 🗾

A 14-day tailor-made itinerary suited to couples, solo travellers, cultural explorers, and multi-generational families. All accommodation, in-destination transfers, activities, and 24-hour in-country support are included, with international flights from a choice of UK airports.

item.description:

Sixty acres on a secluded bay on Corfu's east coast, with eight restaurants, ten heated pools, and a privately serviced beach on Dassia Bay. Ikos Odisia takes the all-inclusive Greek-island holiday and rebuilds it around proper food, real freedom, and a daily rhythm that fits your group.

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Spirit of Antarctica, Antarctica 🚢
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Spirit of Antarctica, Antarctica 🚢
Twelve days on the white continent aboard a brand-new polar expedition ship, with a Science Centre on board and a marine biologist running workshops as you sail. Spirit of Antarctica is a special-edition voyage in partnership with New Scientist Discovery Tours, built for travellers who like their wildlife encounters paired with proper science.
Perfect if you've been waiting for the right reason to head to the Antarctic Peninsula. 🌸
✨ What makes this special: → Twelve-day expedition departing Ushuaia, sailing the Drake Passage to the Antarctic Peninsula 🌍 → Hosted aboard the Douglas Mawson, a new small ship built in 2025 with the Ulstein X-BOW design 🚢 → Maximum 130 guests, with generous viewing space and a quieter cruising experience 👑 → Zodiac cruising and sea kayaking among icebergs, penguin colonies, and resting seals 🛶 → Onboard Science Centre plus polar science workshops led by a marine biologist 🔬 → Educational lecture programme during Drake Passage crossings, with seabird viewing from deck 🦅
Maximum 130 guests across departures running December 2026 through February 2028. Ideal for curious-minded couples, friends, and solo travellers who want to explore Antarctica with like-minded company.
*Twelve days on the Antarctic Peninsula aboard a 130-guest expedition ship* 🚢
Ready to set sail? ⚓ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
